title: [Epic] Restore Missing v1 Parity in Portal v2 (Mobile Navigation)
body: The new React-based Portal v2 is missing the mobile navigation toggle (hamburger menu) that was present in the v1 dashboard.

issues.title: Restore Mobile Navigation Toggle (Hamburger Menu)
issues.body:
The v2 `index.css` includes the `@media (max-width: 1024px)` breakpoints to hide the sidebar, but the `Layout.tsx` header is missing the `.sidebar-toggle-btn` to slide the menu open. 
- Add the hamburger menu button to `Layout.tsx`.
- Implement a state variable `[isSidebarOpen, setIsSidebarOpen]` to toggle the `.open` class on the sidebar.
- Add a backdrop overlay to close the sidebar when tapping outside.
